title: Official 1949 inquest file direct copy from State Records SA
why_unavailable_or_restricted: Open record identified, but direct official archive copy was not acquired in this mission; Abbott-hosted reproduction was acquired instead.
access_procedure: Request/copy GRG 1/27 File 71/1949 from State Records SA.
estimated_availability: Open, subject to archive copy services and fees.
alternative_sources: DOC-0001 Abbott-hosted reproduction; SRC-0003 archive guide.

title: Official 1958 later inquest file direct access
controlling_body: Coroner's Court of South Australia / State Records SA
why_unavailable_or_restricted: State Records SA states access to GRG 1/27 File 53/1958 is restricted and must be requested through the Coroner's Court.
access_procedure: Apply to Coroner's Court citing GRG 1/27 File 53/1958.

title: Current SAPOL open investigation file and original police property/evidence registers
why_unavailable_or_restricted: State Records SA states police files were not transferred because the case remains an open investigation.
access_procedure: Formal SAPOL media/records request or freedom-of-information pathway where available; expect restrictions.
estimated_availability: Unknown; likely restricted while investigation remains open.
